description: Permanent EIP exclusion registry for EC2 edge rotations. polluted[] = upstream-API risk-blocks (docs/deploy/tokenkey-edge-ip-history.md § 2). retired_excluded[] = operational retirements (migration cleanup, decommission) that must not be re-allocated but were not observed polluted (§ 2.1). allocate-clean-egress-eip.py unions both lists per region.

polluted.notes: First documented pollution. User-reported upstream-API risk-block.
upstream-ip-pollution-2026-05-22; operator-confirmed egress pollution; EIP released after §4 rotation to 16.61.87.51; §5 IMPORT drift recovery completed same day.

retired_excluded.notes: Orphan EC2 EIP after uk1 EC2→Lightsail migration; DNS already on Lightsail Static IP 13.134.80.182; released during EC2 residual cleanup (not upstream pollution).
